metadata.note: Very remote Himalayan district. No road-connected ambulance service. Helicopter rescue is primary emergency transport for serious cases.

ambulance.name: Manang District Hospital Emergency Service
ambulance.note: First aid and stabilization only. Heli evacuation arranged for serious cases. Altitude sickness treatment available.

ambulance.name: Himalayan Rescue Association - Manang
ambulance.note: Specialized in high-altitude rescue and AMS/HACE/HAPE treatment. Active during trekking season.
